title: VrtxOmega/veritas-vault
summary: Local-first AI knowledge retention engine. Passively captures sessions from Antigravity and other AI tools, stores them in SQLite with RAG, and provides morning briefs, action items, and searchable memory.

title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: Terminal-first local RAG and AI chat over your documents, code, and crawled websites. Semantic + hybrid search, vision OCR, auto-built wiki, browsable GGUF model catalog. Works as CLI, TUI, MCP server, REST API, or Python library. Offline by default, no sidecar services.

title: M-Pineapple/seashell
summary: MCP server bridging Claude Desktop and Wave Terminal

title: GoGoComputer/openclaw-workspace
summary: Dockerized OpenClaw AI agent environment with local Ollama

title: ricardo-foundry/openhand
summary: Open-source AI agent platform with a plugin-based tool system, sandboxed execution, and LLM-agnostic core. CLI + Web + Server monorepo.

title: vaibhavpandeyvpz/hooman
summary: Hooman is a Bun-powered local AI agent CLI built with TypeScript, Strands Agents SDK, and Ink.

title: ProwlrBot/CyberBox
summary: CyberSandbox — all-in-one Docker security workspace with 160+ tools, dual AI, Caido proxy, and plugin marketplace

title: dllswbr/threep
summary: Local, privacy-first RAG assistant for NIST SP 800-53 compliance Q&A — ask questions about your policy documents, get answers with cited policy sections and control mappings.

title: mindolph/Mindolph
summary: Mindolph is an open source personal knowledge management software with Gen-AI support for all desktop platforms.

title: apiprdt/VibeCheck
summary: The Virtual Senior Developer in your terminal. An AI-powered CLI code auditor, interactive tutor, and technical debt analyzer.

title: christopherlhammer11-ai/hammerlock
summary: Privacy-first local AI assistant with 11 agents, AES-256 encryption, and full offline capability

title: joshuahanielgts/vitalis_ai
summary: Vitalis AI - Autonomous Clinical Intelligence Platform

title: aj-seven/ai-hub
summary: AI Hub - Multi-model assistant for content and chat.

title: akimoto-akira/SiliconLifeCollective
summary: A .NET 9 multi-agent platform where AI agents (Silicon Beings) self-evolve via Roslyn dynamic compilation. Features tick-driven time-sliced scheduling, executor-permission security, and zero-database file storage. Cross-platform, single-file deployable.

title: mercurialsolo/claudectl
summary: Auto pilot for Claude Code - connect multiple coding agents to a local LLM brain. 🆕 with a hive mind now

title: saadnvd1/harry-bot
summary: Personal AI assistant on Telegram. Multi-model routing, persistent memory, soul-based personality, dream consolidation. Built on Claude Code CLI.

title: chaks/personal-wiki
summary: A local AI-powered chat assistant that queries a persistent knowledge wiki built from your documents. Ingests PDFs, URLs, and markdown via Docling, extracts entities/concepts with LLMs, indexes in Qdrant for semantic search, and serves a chat UI—all running offline with Ollama. Inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.
